name: Titnotizing Drop
outcome: [AttackerName] sensually hefts her voluptuous chest in front of [TargetName], [TargetHisOrHer] eyes are helplessly drawn to the luscious globes.|n|As [AttackerHeOrShe] lets [AttackerHisOrHer] heavy chest drop back down with a sensual bounce, [TargetName]'s mind falls with them, reverberating with vivid images of ample tits and lush cleavage.
miss: [AttackerName] sensually hefts her voluptuous chest in front of [TargetName], but [TargetName] manages to look away from the alluring sight.
